data.title: GE HealthCare Technologies declares $0.035 dividend
data.description:
• GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) declares $0.035/share quarterly dividend.
  • Payable May 15; for shareholders of record April 3; ex-div April 3.
  • See GEHC Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Bangchak acquires Chevron’s Hong Kong unit to fuel regional expansion
data.description:
• Bangchak will acquire a 100% equity stake in Chevron Hong Kong (CVX), the company said on Friday. The transaction is expected to be completed in mid-2026.
  • Following the acquisition, Bangchak will continue to operate the service stations under the Caltex brand through a license agreement between Bangchak and Chevron.
  • The investment in CHK will enhance Bangchak’s ability to further develop its overseas fuel retail business, extend into a fully integrated marine fuels business, expand its customer base, strengthen energy logistics capabilities, and create new long-term growth opportunities, the company said.

data.title: Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A. reports Q4 results
data.description:
• Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A. press release (CPAC): Q4 Revenues increased by 6.2%, in line with the increased sales volume mentioned above.
  • Consolidated EBITDA, without the transaction-related expenses, was S/ 158.7 million, an 11.4% increase. Including these expenses, consolidated EBITDA decreased to S/81.1 million.
  • Net income, excluding the transaction-related expenses, was S/ 59.8 million, a 19.6% increase. Including these expenses, net income turned to a net loss of S/ 17.8 million.

data.title: Friday's Economic Calendar
data.description:
8:30 AM CPI 

The CPI is a measure of the change in the average price level of a fixed basket of goods and services purchased by consumers.

The consensus looks for stable inflation readings with CPI up 0.3 percent for total and core on the month and up 2.5 percent from a year ago for both total and core.

1:00 PM Baker Hughes Rig Count

The Baker Hughes North American rig count tracks weekly changes in the number of active operating oil & gas rigs. Used for drilling wellbores for wells that may eventually produce oil or gas, active rigs are essential for the exploration and development of oil and gas fields.

data.title: Agnico Eagle beats top-line and bottom-line estimates; initiates FY26 outlook
data.description:
• Agnico Eagle press release (AEM): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $2.69 beats by $0.04.
  • Revenue of $3.56B (+59.6% Y/Y) beats by $110M.
  • Payable gold production in the fourth quarter of 2025 was 840,608 ounces at production costs per ounce of $1,113, total cash costs per ounce of $1,089 and AISC per ounce of $1,517. The higher realized gold price of $4,163 per ounce in the fourth quarter resulted in strong margins and cash flows, while increasing royalty costs. 
  • The Company generated cash provided by operating activities of $2,112 million or $4.22 per share and record free cash flow of $1,310 million or $2.62 per share.
  • The Company increased its net cash3 position to $2,670 million as at December 31, 2025 as a result of the increase in its cash balance by $511 million to $2,866 million during the quarter and total debt outstanding as at December 31, 2025 of $196 million.

  • The 2026 production and cost guidance summary is set out below.

data.title: Galiano Gold beats top-line and bottom-line estimates; initiates FY26 outlook
data.description:
• Galiano Gold press release (GAU): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.15 beats by $0.03.
  • Revenue of $156.68M (+142.7% Y/Y) beats by $33.68M.
  • The Company sold 38,276 ounces of gold in Q4 2025 at a quarterly record average gold price (before the effect of realized hedging losses) of $4,164/oz for gross revenue of $159.7 million.
  • Reported Adjusted EBITDA1 of $85.5 million in Q4 2025, compared to $21.2 million in Q4 2024.
  • The Company generated $55.8 million of cash flow from operating activities in Q4 2025, compared to $13.8 million in Q4 2024.

  • FY 2026 Guidance

    • For FY 2026, gold production guidance at the AGM is forecast between 140,000 ounces and 160,000 ounces. Higher mined grades are expected to be progressively mined from Abore over the course of the year, therefore gold production is forecast to be weighted to the back half of FY 2026. FY 2026 gold production is forecast to increase approximately 25% compared to FY 2025.

    • AISC1 guidance for FY 2026 is forecast between $2,000/oz and $2,300/oz at a gold price assumption of $4,500/oz and under the current royalty framework in Ghana.

data.title: Air Canada Non-GAAP EPS of C$0.65, revenue of C$5.77B; initiates Q1 and FY26 outlook
data.description:
• Air Canada press release (ACDVF): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of C$0.65.
  • Revenue of C$5.77B (+6.9% Y/Y).
  • Operating income of C$324 million with an operating margin of 5.6% and adjusted EBITDA of C$867 million with an adjusted EBITDA margin of 15.0%.
  • Adjusted CASM* of 15.34 cents
  • Net cash flows from operating activities of C$423 million and free cash flow of negative C$478 million.

  • Outlook

    For the first quarter of 2026, Air Canada plans to increase its operated capacity by about 2.5 per cent from the same quarter in 2025.

    Air Canada is providing the following guidance for the full year 2026.

    Metric 2026 Guidance
    Adjusted EBITDA C$3.35 billion to C$3.75 billion
    ASM capacity 3.5% to 5.5% increase versus 2025
    Adjusted CASM 15.05 ¢ to 15.35 ¢
    Free cash flow C$400 million to C$800 million

data.title: Mattel CEO Ynon Kreiz buys $1.01M in shares at $15.53 apiece
data.description:
• Mattel (MAT) CEO Ynon Kreiz acquired 65,000 shares of company stock at an average price of $15.5277 per share, boosting his total holdings to 1,794,217 shares, according to a recent regulatory filing.
  • The company's shares fell earlier this week after missing estimates for the crucial holiday quarter. Net sales were up 7% year-over-year to $1.77B in Q4, or 5% on a constant currency basis for the quarter that ended on December 31. The increase in sales as reported was driven by a 5% increase in North America and an 11% increase internationally.
